channel.title: Shanghai Weather Forecast
channel.description: Daily weather forecast for Shanghai via QWeather.

item.title: 2026-05-27: Cloudy, 23°C - 28°C
item.description:
Condition (Day): Cloudy (Icon: 101)
Condition (Night): Cloudy (Icon: 151)
Temperature: 23°C to 28°C
Precipitation: 0.0 mm
Cloud Cover: 25%

Wind (Day): NW (315°), Scale 1-3, Speed 3 km/h
Wind (Night): NW (315°), Scale 1-3, Speed 3 km/h

Humidity: 84%
Visibility: 25 km
Sun: Rise 04:53, Set 18:51
Moon: Rise 15:17, Set 02:08 (Phase: Waxing gibbous,803)
UV Index: 3
